summary.text:
The question is: "Search X for what people are saying about the Linux Foundation launching the x402 Foundation (payment protocol for AI agents, members include Circle, Visa, Mastercard, Coinbase, Goog...I need to search X for tweets about the Linux Foundation launching x402 Foundation in the last 48 hours. The topic is payment protocol for AI agents with those members.

Since the date is July 15, 2026, last 48 hours: July 13-15, 2026.

output.input: {"query":"Linux Foundation launching x402 Foundation payment protocol for AI agents members Circle Visa Mastercard Coinbase Google AWS Stripe Solana Foundation","limit":"10","from_date":"2026-07-13","to_date":"2026-07-15","min_score_threshold":"0.1"}
output.name: x_semantic_search

content.text:
**Here are the 5 most notable tweets** from the last 48 hours (July 13–15, 2026) discussing the Linux Foundation’s launch of the x402 Foundation for AI-agent payments (with members including Circle, Visa, Mastercard, Coinbase, Google, AWS, Stripe, Solana Foundation, Ripple, Stellar, etc.):

- **@linuxfoundation** (562 likes, 135 reposts): Official announcement of the operational launch of the x402 Foundation under the Linux Foundation to enable open, internet-native payments over HTTP for AI agents and apps, backed by 40 initial member organizations.[[1]](https://x.com/linuxfoundation/status/2077015781959729490)

- **@RealAllinCrypto** (242 likes, 60 reposts): “JUST IN” post highlighting the launch, noting involvement of $XLM, $XRP, $QNT and listing major members (Ripple, Stellar, Cardano, NEAR, Quant, Solana, Circle, Coinbase, Google, AWS, Visa, Mastercard, Stripe).[[2]](https://x.com/RealAllinCrypto/status/2077045475706868193)

- **@BuildOnStellar** (201 likes, 34 reposts): Detailed summary of the x402 Foundation launch as an open-governance body for HTTP-based payments, naming 40 members including AWS, Visa, Mastercard, Stripe, Google, Cloudflare, Circle, and Stellar as a Premier member.[[3]](https://x.com/BuildOnStellar/status/2077064939492282711)

- **@CoinMarketCap** (76 likes, 13 reposts): News alert on the Linux Foundation launching the x402 Foundation to steward the protocol for standardizing internet-native payments for AI agents and applications.[[4]](https://x.com/CoinMarketCap/status/2077459478908158400)

- **@angrycryptoshow** (77 likes, 13 reposts): Report on the Cardano Foundation joining x402 as an Associate Member, describing the open payment standard pioneered by Coinbase that enables per-request payments in stablecoins without accounts or API keys.[[5]](https://x.com/angrycryptoshow/status/2077120539450073293)

These posts reflect the main buzz around the announcement, with strong engagement on crypto, blockchain, and tech accounts.
